The Spice Craze
programme.desc: Spices are a hot item in the Middle Ages! Lord Roach just can't get enough of the stuff! If you can't find the spice you want at the local market stall, it's probably on the other side of the world! And so off goes Little Lewis.

programme.title: Three Versions
programme.desc: Albert appears hanging from the basket with a pineapple. Robbie and Naomi give their versions of what happened to the principal.

programme.title: 28 Chores Later
programme.desc: When Max becomes obsessed with his new reality game that involves killing zombies while performing household tasks, Noodles takes the lead and pursues his own idea.

programme.title: Wild Family Parents
programme.desc: There are lots of different parenting skills in the wild. Mammals and birds tend to have a few babies, which they look after carefully. Insects, fish and reptiles usually have lots of offspring. The next generation survives just because there are so many of them.

programme.title: Time for Theatre
programme.desc: It was in Ancient Greece that the very first plays were created from songs and dances performed during religious festivals. Howler and Columba bring us tragedy, comedy and poetry through the theatre of life!

programme.title: My Fair Fico
programme.desc: Team Doki is invited to a dinner party at a palace in Denmark. They're excited to be going to such a fancy affair. Anabella and Gabi worry that Fico might embarrass them with his poor table manners! Doki doesn't think it's a big deal. What are manners for, anyway?

programme.title: HIV Vaccine On Trial
programme.desc: A team of French scientists has developed a potential HIV/AIDS vaccine, using a protein of the HIV-virus called 'GP41'. It allows the generation of neutralising antibodies and could in turn help overcome one of the world's most pernicious diseases.

programme.title: Why Are Plants So Green?
programme.desc: The chlorophyll in plants takes in energy from sunlight. It absorbs colours like red and blue, but reflects the green wavelengths back to us. This process makes plants look green to our eyes.

programme.title: Vikings
programme.desc: Like Raven and Little Lewis, the famous giants of the northern mists, the Vikings, are master looters and navigators. Besides being bloody warriors and shrewd negotiators, the Vikings are also great explorers, out to discover the world.

programme.title: Day of the Prank
programme.desc: Gav plays a deviously brilliant prank on Ricky, so he decides to get his own back using six thousand cups of juice. All this with the helping of ninja art - a fake plaster cast, a 3D initial, and some lovely prank soap.

programme.title: Mountain of Water
programme.desc: Four young adventurers travel to Marakele National Park in South Africa. They spot baby impalas and a pride of lions, and almost walk into a herd of White Rhino. While travelling on foot they come across a battle between Matabele ants and termites.

programme.title: Circuit Basics
programme.desc: Smorph's favourite robot toy has stopped working! See how an electrical circuit is made and get the robot working again.

programme.title: Panda and Macaw
programme.desc: Posse, the red panda, and Santiago, the saki, have been having issues with their teeth and the dentist brought his big pliers! Ever heard the tale of how the blue-throated macaw parrot was saved from extinction and started a new fashion trend in the process?

programme.title: Oil Platform
programme.desc: A visit to an oil platform leads to an accident that Kit and Mr. Battery must set right.

programme.title: Trip to Canada
programme.desc: Everybody knows that at school you learn about letters and numbers, history, poetry, and lots of other things. But in Canada, at school, you can also learn about fishing. It's time for another trip. And, of course, we will meet one of Alim's penfriends - Sakari.

programme.title: Contents Under Pressure
programme.desc: Hulk is shocked to see Brett behaving in a way that makes him think twice about his new friendship. But when Miss Marner drops by for a surprise visit, the gang must work together to get rid of her.

programme.title: The Leech's Spaghetti Dinner
programme.desc: The giant Bornean leech can grow up to half a metre long. It finds earthworms to eat by following the smell of their slimy trail. Because the leech has no teeth, it slurps the worms like spaghetti.

programme.desc: Joe, Olly, and Oscar got inspired by the gym vloggers and decided to create their own Free-G video to post online. Madi has many challenges to overcome as she sets off for her first British Gymnastics residential training camp.

NEWS ON THE HOUR: Provides live coverage of news and current affairs from around the world, bringing viewers the latest breaking news.

programme.title: E425
programme.desc: C'EST LA VIE: C'est La Vie focuses on the real experiences of ordinary people amid the tide of the times. Through in-depth interviews and observational filming, it presents a vivid social visual archive of contemporary China with authentic life stories. With profound humanistic care and compelling narrative tension, it has earned widespread acclaim and numerous awards both at home and abroad, establishing itself as a benchmark in Chinese-language documentaries. Continuously conveying warmth and strength, it inspires viewers to reflect deeply on humanity and destiny.

programme.title: E387 - Updated Military Status (II)

programme.desc: Live context and clarity to the day's top stories from around the world.

programme.title: E160
programme.desc: A look at some of the wildest courtroom moments. A defendant flips off a judge; a baby interrupts a hearing; a mom sounds off on one of the men responsible for her daughter's death; and more.

programme.title: Beyond The Headlines: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Companion piece to the movie Black Girl Missing. While the media goes into a frenzy over missing white girls, Black women's disappearances receive muted coverage and limited police resources.

programme.title: E9 - Sheila LaBarre: Sheila The Peeler
programme.desc: In Epping, New Hampshire, Sheila LaBarre was known as an eccentric widow who loved her rabbits. But her turbulent childhood, a coma-induced vision, and her husband's death sent Sheila on a mission to kill.

programme.title: E2 - Freeway Shooter Or Innocent Father?
programme.desc: A 21-year-old man is charged with domestic terrorism after a spree of shootings on the freeway sends the public into panic. Facing over 100 years in prison, the young father claims he has an alibi.

programme.title: Best Of DW Podcasts
programme.desc: Select DW podcasts enrich the program with current analyses of world politics and its influence on our daily lives. There will also be space in the program for lively discussions about social standards and taboos.

programme.title: Beijing Spring - The Democracy Wall Movement In China
programme.desc: Mao's death was followed by a very short period of freedom of expression in China. Known as the 'Beijing Spring', it was part of the new head of state Deng Xiaoping's desire to distance himself from the mistakes of the Cultural Revolution.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: E98
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan's first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E2 - From Bathtime to Bedtime Fun!
programme.desc: Go from bathtime to bedtime with Mia & Max! The fun starts with a splashy, bubbly good time as the kids play with their rubber ducks & get nice & clean in the tub. After the bath, it's time to get into pajamas & play a fun game of Peek-a-boo with Mummy using lots of different objects from around the house. Finally, it's time for bed as Daddy & Ella take turns giving Max a cuddle & a teddy bear before he goes to sleep. Night night!

programme.title: E5 - Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E4 - JJ's Magical Dreamland Dance Party!
programme.desc: Join JJ for a dance party in a magical dreamland! Blast off to outer space to sing & dance among the stars with a friendly Bunny Astronaut. Then, travel to imaginary lands to party with magical friends like unicorns & mermaids! The adventure continues as you stomp your feet & snap your claws along with dinosaurs to the 'Snap, Snap, Snap' song. With fun copy-me dances & beautiful ballet moves, it's a dance party beyond your wildest dreams!

programme.title: E1 - When Buster's Dreams Come to Life!
programme.desc: Join Buster as his amazing dreams come to life! First, he dreams he is a fish, complete with a tail & fins! He's scared when he meets a big shark, but soon learns the shark just wants a friend to play with. Then, it's all stations go as Buster dreams he's a space rocket & blasts off to tour all the planets! The dreams continue as he becomes Sheriff Buster in the wild west & finds a magic spell book that causes all sorts of trouble!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!

The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E9 - Super Sandcastle
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built a super sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to storm it by firing her hordes of Mini Peas at it with her pea shooter.

programme.title: E10 - Walkie Talkie
programme.desc: The veggies are playing walkie-talkie hide-and-seek, but Evil Pea steals Carrot's walkie-talkie and uses it to trick the Veggies into getting trapped by the Corn Cobs.

programme.title: E15 - Explorers
programme.desc: While waiting to be picked up from school, Jack plays at being a sailor trying to find his way back home to Australia. Meanwhile, Jack's Dad has got lost on route to collect him.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E23 - Stick Together
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: E9 - Horsey Ride
programme.desc: When Bluey forgets to put her favourite toy away, Socks grabs it! The kids stage a horsey wedding to distract her, with Dad and Uncle Stripe as the horses!

programme.title: E27 - Musical Statues
programme.desc: At the end of a long day, Bluey and her family are out of sync and out of sorts, so Mum gets everyone to play musical statues.

programme.title: E28 - Stories
programme.desc: Indy thinks she's no good because her model horse looks like a cow, but Calypso encourages her not to give up, so she tries to fix it with a little help from Winton.

programme.title: E14 - Paper Fan
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Playtime Towers, so Bella helps Lift cool down with a paper fan. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who has a flapping paper fan dance!

programme.title: E47 - Go Jet Academy: Volcanic Island
programme.desc: There's trouble erupting for the Go Jetters as Glitch disturbs an underwater volcano...

programme.title: E8 - James The Super Engine
programme.desc: When James hears the children of Sodor talking about their latest comic book superhero, he imagines that he too can become a hero.

programme.title: E35 - Tummy Talk
programme.desc: When Sarah forgets her sandwich, her rumbling tummy inadvertently starts a conversation with a Frog.

programme.title: E11 - Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: E10 - The Cheese Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels go on a mission to contain an outbreak.

programme.title: E15 - Say Cheese
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: E5 - Avocado
programme.desc: The fabulous Avocados sing an operatic piece in their three unique voices.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. programme.title: E9 - Vote Zombozo
programme.desc: When the Rustbucket must have a tune-up in the same town as Zombozo's latest campaign trail stop, Ben discovers the clown is using his speeches to hypnotise and rob the town.

programme.title: E10 - Animorphosis
programme.desc: As the Tennysons dig up dinosaur fossils in the Badlands, Ben is unaware that Vilgax and Dr. Amino have teamed up to steal alien DNA from the Omnitrix. Vilgax then double-crosses his fellow villain.

programme.title: Urkel Saves Santa: The Movie!
programme.desc: The brilliant but accident-prone Steve Urkel goes to find Santa to help the city rediscover the holiday spirit.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Superman returns after five years in space to find Lois engaged and Lex Luthor with a sinister plan that will endanger America.

programme.title: E3 - Waiting for Winter
programme.desc: It’s November at Cape Tatnam. Winter is coming to the lower Western shore of Hudson Bay. But the ice - which should be forming on Hudson Bay by now - is nowhere to be seen. 2016 has been the warmest year on record. In late November, the temperature is 10 degrees warmer than its average. Climate change is wreaking havoc across the North. At just below zero degrees Celsius, the sea cannot freeze.

programme.title: E6 - Changing Tides
programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E5 - The Scent Detectives
programme.desc: A Labrador cross and its partner help prevent ecological disaster in Canada, a Lagotto Romagnolo unearths a rare delicacy in Washington forests, and a Belgian malinois team tracks down the critically endangered geometric tortoise to save the species.

programme.title: E8 - Outbreak!
programme.desc: The race is on to find Tulia and Zalipa, who are missing from Palas Island. And after months of convalescence, Beni returns to forest school but faces another setback at the milk bucket. Meanwhile, the vets keep a close eye on pregnant Dilla.

programme.title: E3 - Waiting for Winter
programme.desc: It’s November at Cape Tatnam. Winter is coming to the lower Western shore of Hudson Bay. programme.desc: Bundle up as Lizzie heads north to tag sharks and witness first-hand the slow, sobering disappearance of sea ice. Do time in bear jail with polar bears who are caught raiding a town for food after their icy hunting grounds diminish.

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E5 - The Scent Detectives
programme.desc: A Labrador cross and its partner help prevent ecological disaster in Canada, a Lagotto Romagnolo unearths a rare delicacy in Washington forests, and a Belgian malinois team tracks down the critically endangered geometric tortoise to save the species.

programme.desc: A Labrador cross and its partner help prevent ecological disaster in Canada, a Lagotto Romagnolo unearths a rare delicacy in Washington forests, and a Belgian malinois team tracks down the critically endangered geometric tortoise to save the species.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of the Bear
programme.desc: Join a mother brown bear as she struggles to find food for her two young cubs while teaching them essential skills for the harsh winter ahead. Then visit a pair of tiny lynx kittens as they begin to venture away from the safety of their den.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of the Wolf
programme.desc: In the remote wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains lives an elusive predator that has inspired awe and fear throughout history: the Eurasian wolf. Discover the vital role that these once-misunderstood hunters play in protecting their ecosystem.

programme.title: E9 - Dilla and Delilah
programme.desc: The fate of several graduates awaits the next round of wild releases. Meanwhile, runaway Zalipa is found, but her partner in crime, Tulia, is still missing. And Baby Clarita has a complete meltdown as the vets perform surgery on her mother.

programme.title: E1 - The Clean Up Crew
programme.desc: Winter in Marakele National Park is one of the scarcest, but also most plentiful, times of the year. See how a giraffe’s demise becomes a source of life for the region’s vultures, whose survival depends on the decaying flesh of animals like these.

programme.desc: Winter in Marakele National Park is one of the scarcest, but also most plentiful, times of the year. See how a giraffe’s demise becomes a source of life for the region’s vultures, whose survival depends on the decaying flesh of animals like these.

programme.title: E5 - The Scent Detectives
programme.desc: A Labrador cross and its partner help prevent ecological disaster in Canada, a Lagotto Romagnolo unearths a rare delicacy in Washington forests, and a Belgian malinois team tracks down the critically endangered geometric tortoise to save the species.

programme.title: E3 - Thailand: Coming of Age
programme.desc: The temperate north meets the tropical south along the Mekong’s banks in Thailand. Follow the river through the Golden Triangle and see the courtship dances of the region’s abundant bird species. Then take in a festival honouring water spirits.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of the Bear
programme.desc: Join a mother brown bear as she struggles to find food for her two young cubs while teaching them essential skills for the harsh winter ahead. Then visit a pair of tiny lynx kittens as they begin to venture away from the safety of their den.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of the Wolf
programme.desc: In the remote wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains lives an elusive predator that has inspired awe and fear throughout history: the Eurasian wolf. Discover the vital role that these once-misunderstood hunters play in protecting their ecosystem.

programme.title: E8 - Outbreak!
programme.desc: The race is on to find Tulia and Zalipa, who are missing from Palas Island. And after months of convalescence, Beni returns to forest school but faces another setback at the milk bucket. Meanwhile, the vets keep a close eye on pregnant Dilla.

programme.title: E9 - Dilla and Delilah
programme.desc: The fate of several graduates awaits the next round of wild releases. Meanwhile, runaway Zalipa is found, but her partner in crime, Tulia, is still missing. And Baby Clarita has a complete meltdown as the vets perform surgery on her mother.

programme.title: E3 - Waiting for Winter
programme.desc: It’s November at Cape Tatnam. Winter is coming to the lower Western shore of Hudson Bay. But the ice - which should be forming on Hudson Bay by now - is nowhere to be seen. 2016 has been the warmest year on record. In late November, the temperature is 10 degrees warmer than its average. Climate change is wreaking havoc across the North. At just below zero degrees Celsius, the sea cannot freeze.

Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: E6 - Is Butchery A Disappearing Profession?
programme.desc: There is a shortage of new butchers. Nearly 10,000 butcher positions are unfilled across Canada. Why? Also covered: potassium, essential for health; food waste at festivals; rockfish (sebaste), now sold in stores.

programme.title: E8 - Melanie's Challenges/The Keeper Of The Keys
programme.desc: In 2006, Melanie Brugger had a terrible riding accident. She suffered a head injury and was in a coma for 27 days. When she awoke, she decided to take up mountaineering. Vincent Hammel hails from Porrentruy and nurtures a passion for his city's history.

programme.title: E5 - Effects Of Climate Change On Indigenous Peoples
programme.desc: In Old Crow, how are Chief Dana Tizya-Tramm and his Gwich'in community facing climate warming and what can the rest of the world learn from their initiatives?

programme.title: E3 - Baulmes For The Soul
programme.desc: Mireille Keita builds bridges between the country that offered her a home, Switzerland, and her native Africa. She is the organiser of the Yelen Africa Festival in Baulmes, showcasing the advantages of cultural mixity. The profits are then used to improve people's lives in several villages in Mali.

programme.title: E6 - Is Butchery A Disappearing Profession?
programme.desc: There is a shortage of new butchers. Nearly 10,000 butcher positions are unfilled across Canada. Why? Also covered: potassium, essential for health; food waste at festivals; rockfish (sebaste), now sold in stores.

programme.title: E8 - Melanie's Challenges/The Keeper Of The Keys
programme.desc: In 2006, Melanie Brugger had a terrible riding accident. She suffered a head injury and was in a coma for 27 days. When she awoke, she decided to take up mountaineering. Vincent Hammel hails from Porrentruy and nurtures a passion for his city's history.

programme.title: E6 - Is Butchery A Disappearing Profession?
programme.desc: There is a shortage of new butchers. Nearly 10,000 butcher positions are unfilled across Canada. Why? Also covered: potassium, essential for health; food waste at festivals; rockfish (sebaste), now sold in stores.

programme.title: E9 - The Melody Of Happiness/Werner's Horseshoes
programme.desc: Multi-instrumentalist Alexandre Cellier takes us on a walk and shares his love of freedom, encounters and improvisation. Werner Baumer is an extraordinary blacksmith. With his outstanding skill and precision, he adapts to all situations and ensures that each animal receives the care it needs.

programme.title: E90 - Rene Pierre, An Institution In The World Of Games
programme.desc: Fashion, craftwork, design, beauty, cuisine, lifestyle... a round-up of the best moments from ''Tendance XXI''!

programme.title: E9 - Man Vs Machine
programme.desc: There's plenty of malfunctions in these clips of man vs. machine. From power tools to semi-trucks, each moment is a wild adventure caught on camera.

programme.title: E10 - The Friendly Skies
programme.desc: It's time to look upwards with incredible airborne moments caught on camera. From skydiving mishaps to a thieving eagle, these clips defy gravity!

programme.title: E9 - This Is Going To Hurt

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E27
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E30
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

E7 - The Bald And The Beautiful
programme.desc: When Al and Steve face up to the bald fact that they are both losing their hair, they decide to seek the counsel and encouragement of a hairless support group.

programme.title: E2 - Part 2
programme.desc: Though Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow's crime spree is legendary, their story has never been told quite like this. Fueled by their passion for each other and Bonnie's obsession with fame, the couple committed increasingly dangerous robberies, leaving a trail of blood - and headlines - behind them. Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown.

Aided by Clyde's sixth sense, they stayed one step ahead of the law until their final, fateful showdown.

programme.title: E9 - Gwenivere Of Glendale

programme.title: E2 - A Room With A Clue
programme.desc: With the rest of the team racing to stop an illicit weapons sale, Rex resolves to bring justice all on his own when he witnesses a murder while stuck at home.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: E12 - All's Hair
programme.desc: When a celebrity wigmaker is murdered, Elsbeth must comb through a tangled mess of suspects – and some drag brunch mayhem – to clip a killer.

programme.title: E12 - All's Hair
programme.desc: When a celebrity wigmaker is murdered, Elsbeth must comb through a tangled mess of suspects – and some drag brunch mayhem – to clip a killer.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story and based on the hit eponymous Italian drama series, Doc begins its second season of the life-affirming medical drama following the heartbreak and victories of hard-charging, brilliant physician Dr. Amy Larsen (Molly Parker) as she rebuilds her life after a car crash erased eight years of her memory. This season, Amy will continue to confront hard truths about her missing years, work to repair fractured relationships and seek to reconcile the person she used to be with the one everyone else has come to know.

programme.title: E3 - Shuck Everlasting
programme.desc: While Donovan tracks a marine smuggling operation, the team investigates the night of a wedding to uncover why the best man ended up at the bottom of the Atlantic.

programme.title: E3 - Shuck Everlasting
programme.desc: While Donovan tracks a marine smuggling operation, the team investigates the night of a wedding to uncover why the best man ended up at the bottom of the Atlantic.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 高中畢業出身會計師張浩宇面對大型會計師事務所的不正之風，以最不像會計師的方式實現正義。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E3 - 重生之娘娘團商戰打起來了？
programme.desc: 蔡少芬、陶昕然、斕曦、張曉龍、藍盈瑩、陳思斯、楊九郎時隔13年後首次合體重聚，以全新的面貌組成「煥新團」，從承載無數記憶的《甄嬛傳》拍攝地北京大觀園出發，自北向南，由東向西，前往全國多個寶藏民族文化發源地，通過深度探訪、遊學，體驗各地民俗文化和風土人情，帶著回憶和新的憧憬環遊全國以完成“煥新之旅”。

programme.title: E7 - 趙傳再現搖滾經典
programme.desc: 每集由一位原唱歌手對抗三位金曲守護人，以自己的非主打歌與主打歌同台PK，通過現場500位大眾聽審的投票決定挑戰是否成功。原唱歌手包括任賢齊、鄭少秋、吳克群、周筆暢、鄧紫棋、李克勤、趙傳、蔡健雅、許美靜、許茹芸等。

programme.title: Beyond's Diary
programme.desc: This is the story of four aspiring young men striving to fight for their own goals. Kui and his family are intent upon emigrating to another country and they put all their energy in making as much money as possible in order to leave Hong Kong sooner. However just as their goal is about in sight, over-exertion causes Kui to fall ill...Keung is a smart and aggressive young man whose ambition is to make it in the world. But misfortune descends upon him when discovering that he and his family are duped by his boss...It has been a childhood dream of Chung to join the police force but his fragile frame of a body is far from satisfactory, so he turns to conducting traffic and handing out tickets to unfortunate drivers amid the bustles of the streets. However, his virtue is not appreciated...Wing is a diligent and self-absorbed student. programme.title: Market's Romance
programme.desc: Kudzu, Mud Carp and Bean depend on each other for survival since their parents died. Kudzu, the eldest of three sisters, gave up her studies and runs a fish stall in Luen Yee Hui market to raise her two young sisters. She is a super fan of the famous Singer, Alex. Mud Carp, the second sister, becomes a lawyer after university. Her boyfriend, David, comes from a rich family. In view of this, she dares not tell David her family background even though they are planning to get married. Kudzu always hopes her youngest sister Bean, to further her studies but she falls in love with a middle-aged butcher, Wing. One day, Kudzu discovers that her good friend, Keung, has a long-lost brother, and comes to the hopeful conclusion that his lost brother is Alex. In the process of helping Keung to find his brother, the relationship between the three sisters changed...

Kudzu, the eldest of three sisters, gave up her studies and runs a fish stall in Luen Yee Hui market to raise her two young sisters. She is a super fan of the famous Singer, Alex. Mud Carp, the second sister, becomes a lawyer after university. Her boyfriend, David, comes from a rich family. In view of this, she dares not tell David her family background even though they are planning to get married. Kudzu always hopes her youngest sister Bean, to further her studies but she falls in love with a middle-aged butcher, Wing. One day, Kudzu discovers that her good friend, Keung, has a long-lost brother, and comes to the hopeful conclusion that his lost brother is Alex. In the process of helping Keung to find his brother, the relationship between the three sisters changed...
